case_title: ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC. VS. JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA AND DECLARATION, SERVED ON MUKUL BAKSHI, OWNER TUNGSTEN ADVERTISING, FILED.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY PROTECTION
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO MUKUL BAKSHI, OWNER: TUNGSTEN ADVERTISING, 268 BUS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY PROTECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY PROTECTION * THE COURT FINDS THE PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO PRESENT ANY WITNESSES IN COURT CAUSE HIM TO FAIL TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. WHILE THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE TESTIMONY OF CLIFFORD MAYES WAS PRESENTED, MR. MAYES MERELY STATED HE SAW THE SECURITY GUARD "COUNT MONEY", NOT THAT HE WAS COUNTING THE LARGE OF AMOUNTS OF MONEY TESTIFIED TO BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED MAY-22-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY PROTECTION
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT REGARDING IMPROPER SERVICE ON HIM OF SUBPOENA, FILED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC. JOHNSON, HAROLD INDIVIDUAL & DBA JOHNSON SECURITY PROTECTION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALF AND ALF EVENT PLANNING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
